title: Goat Horn Range
description: Modify the range of the goat horn sound with a gamerule.
body:
# Goat Horn Range

With the Goat Horn Range mod you can modify the range of the goat horn sound with a gamerule.

To enable this it fixes the issue of the sound being limited by the server view distance. 

## Requirements

This mod requires the Fabric Loader and the Fabric API.
